sections.paragraph:
not used in Kal, i.q. דָּחָה, נָדַח to thrust out, to cast away. Arab. دَاخَ to render abject, and intrans. to be vile, abject. VI. to cast forth.

Hiphil הֵדִיחַ-

(1) to thrust out, to cast away, Jer 51:34.

(2) to wash away, to purge the altar, 2Ch 4:6 Eze 40:38 the crime of bloodshed, Isa 4:4.
